summary: A clip from a NewsNation segment labeled THE BRADLEY REPORT. A reporter stands at night in front of a border fence topped with concertina wire, with a U.S. flag in the corner and a lower-third reading EXCLUSIVE: THE WORST OF THE WORST. The segment shows a graphic with a booking photo captioned with a name, FROM MEXICO, SEX ASSAULT OF A CHILD, and a stamp ARRESTED IN CALIFORNIA, sourced to DHS, and cuts to a split screen of a studio anchor and the field reporter.

script.scene: A reporter stands at night in front of a border fence with concertina wire; lower-third reads EXCLUSIVE: THE WORST OF THE WORST.
A graphic shows a booking photo with the captions FROM MEXICO, SEX ASSAULT OF A CHILD, and a stamp ARRESTED IN CALIFORNIA, sourced to DHS.
A split screen shows a studio anchor and the field reporter at the fence.

notable_text: THE BRADLEY REPORT; EXCLUSIVE: THE WORST OF THE WORST; NEWS NATION; FROM MEXICO; SEX ASSAULT OF A CHILD; ARRESTED IN CALIFORNIA; Source: DHS
